property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\VISHNU VARDHAN\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314;C:\Users\VISHNU VARDHAN\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Scripts;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\VISHNU VARDHAN\scoop\shims;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\VISHNU VARDHAN\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\VISHNU VARDHAN\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\Users\VISHNU VARDHAN\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\VISHNU VARDHAN\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\VISHNU VARDHAN\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.16-bin\apache-maven-3.9.16\bin;;.
